title: Method Level 1A — Foundations
summary: Core single-hand patterns, basic rhythms, and C-position reading for the very first weeks of study.

exercises.title: Single C Pulse
exercises.summary: Whole notes on middle C — the simplest possible reading drill.
exercises.goal: Produce a steady, full-value tone on middle C.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C and D
exercises.summary: Quarters on C and D — the first two-note reading exercise.
exercises.goal: Move reliably between adjacent keys C and D.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Three Steps Up
exercises.summary: Right hand steps through C, D, and E.
exercises.goal: Read and play three adjacent notes evenly.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Step and Hold
exercises.summary: Short step followed by a half-note hold.
exercises.goal: Connect quarter motion to a sustained half note.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Skip to E
exercises.summary: Thirds between C and E — the first skip.
exercises.goal: Recognize and play a melodic third confidently.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Position Climb
exercises.summary: Right hand ascends and descends through the full C position.
exercises.goal: Read all five notes of C position in order.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Quarter Rest Pause
exercises.summary: Notes separated by quarter rests — counting silence.
exercises.goal: Hold each rest for its exact value before the next note.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Half Note Steps
exercises.summary: Slow stepwise melody using only half notes.
exercises.goal: Sustain each half note for its full two-beat value.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Three Beat Walk
exercises.summary: First reading in 3/4 time, stepping through C, D, E.
exercises.goal: Feel the three-beat pulse and read in waltz meter.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Two Beat March
exercises.summary: Compact 2/4 march pattern stepping up through C position.
exercises.goal: Feel the strong downbeat in a two-beat measure.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass C Pulse
exercises.summary: Whole notes on bass C — first left-hand reading.
exercises.goal: Produce full-value whole notes with the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass C and D
exercises.summary: Left hand quarters on C3 and D3.
exercises.goal: Move between two adjacent bass-clef notes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Three Steps
exercises.summary: Left hand reads C, D, and E in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Track three adjacent notes in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Skip
exercises.summary: Left hand skips a third between C3 and E3.
exercises.goal: Play thirds confidently with the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Half Notes
exercises.summary: Slow half-note motion in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Sustain bass notes for two full beats.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Rest Steps
exercises.summary: Left-hand steps with quarter rests for counting practice.
exercises.goal: Count rests silently and accurately in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass C Position
exercises.summary: Left hand ascends and descends through the full C position in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read all five notes of bass C position fluently.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Whole Notes
exercises.summary: Wide-interval whole notes in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Play whole notes with a relaxed, full tone in low register.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Climb and Return
exercises.summary: Right hand climbs all five notes of C position then descends back.
exercises.goal: Play an even scale-like figure up and back down.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Foundation Capstone
exercises.summary: A four-measure review mixing steps, skips, rests, and note values.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate all Level 1A foundations in one complete piece.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
